---
name: Profile Component Issue
about: Report broken badges, failing workflows, or layout regressions.
title: "[ISSUE] Broken Component: <Component Name>"
labels: bug, profile-maintenance
assignees: gbvk312
---

## Description
Which part of the profile is broken? (e.g., Stats, Snake Game, Trophies, etc.)

## URL or Screenshot
Please provide the URL to the image or a screenshot of the broken section.

## Observed Behavior
- [ ] Image returning 404
- [ ] Stats not updating
- [ ] Workflow failing (please link to the Action run)
- [ ] Layout misalignment

## Steps to Reproduce
(Optional) Mention if this happens on mobile, desktop, or specific themes.
